particulars.description: Firstly the property known as unit 2 killycard business park, castleblayney, county monaghan and registered at the register county of monaghan under folio 21222F. secondly the property known as 3 laurel brook gardens, dundalk, county louth and registered at the register of county louth under folio 13925F. thirdly the property known as 16 laurel brook gardens, dundalk, county louth and registered at the register of county louth under folio 13681F.
